title: From Words to Action
content: Read IGF MAG Chair Jennifer Chung's blog post on a running start to IGF 2026, recent decisions taken by the MAG, and on new MAG Chair 'office hours'.

title: IGF 2026 Calls Launched!
content: Now open! We are calling for session proposals, applications for IGF Village booths, and remote hubs ahead of IGF 2026 in Nairobi, Kenya (14-18 December). All are invited to make submissions by the shared deadline of 31 July 2026, 23:59 UTC.

title: IGF MAG Approves Four Policy Networks for 2026
content: Following a review of over 60 community proposals for intersessional work streams, the MAG has selected four Policy Networks that will serve as year-round multistakeholder platforms for dialogue, collaboration, and the development of outputs throughout 2026.
snippet: Following a review of over 60 community proposals for intersessional work streams, the MAG has selected four Policy Networks that will serve as year-round multistakeholder platforms for dialogue,
creator: Herman Johansen

title: BIGF Joins National Economic Diplomacy Conference, Calls for Digital Governance to Be Central to Bangladesh’s Growth Roadmap
content: BIGF Joins National Economic Diplomacy Conference, Calls for Digital Governance to Be Central to Bangladesh’s Growth Roadmap
creator: Herman Johansen

title: Consultations & MAG Meeting
content: The First IGF 2026 Open Consultations and Multistakeholder Advisory Group (MAG) Meeting will take place on 24-26 June 2026 in Nairobi & Online. ALL are invited to register and consult developing information on the meeting page.
snippet: The First IGF 2026 Open Consultations and Multistakeholder Advisory Group (MAG) Meeting will take place on 24-26 June 2026 in Nairobi & Online. ALL are invited to register and consult developing
creator: mazzucchi.eleonora_255

title: 2026 MAG Announced
content: The IGF 2026 Multistakeholder Advisory Group (MAG), appointed by the Secretary-General, has been announced, including the new Chair, Ms. Jennifer Chung. See the press release and MAG list!
snippet: The IGF 2026 Multistakeholder Advisory Group (MAG), appointed by the Secretary-General, has been announced, including the new Chair, Ms. Jennifer Chung. See the press release and MAG list!
creator: mazzucchi.eleonora_255

title: Read the IGF EGM Report
content: An Expert Group Meeting (EGM) on the IGF and its permanent mandate was held in New York on 14-15 April 2026. The report from the multistakeholder gathering of 30 experts is now available to read.
snippet: An Expert Group Meeting (EGM) on the IGF and its permanent mandate was held in New York on 14-15 April 2026. The report from the multistakeholder gathering of 30 experts is now available to read.
creator: mazzucchi.eleonora_255

title: IGF 2026 to Be Held in Nairobi
content: The IGF is pleased to officially announce that the 21st annual IGF meeting will take place in Nairobi, Kenya, from 14 to 18 December. More information will be shared soon - access the IGF 2026 page to stay tuned.
snippet: The IGF is pleased to officially announce that the 21st annual IGF meeting will take place in Nairobi, Kenya, from 14 to 18 December. More information will be shared soon - access the IGF 2026 page to
creator: Herman Johansen

title: See IGF 2026 Inputs
content: Following our public calls for priority issues to shape the IGF 2026 cycle, including IGF intersessional policy work, all submissions -- reflecting topics from AI, to misinformation and data governance -- are now available to view: IGF 2026 Programme Issues | IGF Intersessional Policy Proposals.
snippet: Following our public calls for priority issues to shape the IGF 2026 cycle, including IGF intersessional policy work, all submissions -- reflecting topics from AI, to misinformation and data
creator: mazzucchi.eleonora_255

title: Meet Our New Global Advocate!
content: We are thrilled to announce that Joseph Gordon-Levitt, actor, filmmaker and founder of HitRecord, has been appointed the first United Nations Global Advocate for Human-centric Digital Governance. In his new role -- affiliated with the IGF and designated by UN DESA -- Mr. Gordon-Levitt will help advance a people-centred approach to digital governance and connect global policy discussions with everyday experience.
snippet: We are thrilled to announce that Joseph Gordon-Levitt, actor, filmmaker and founder of HitRecord, has been appointed the first United Nations Global Advocate for Human-centric Digital Governance. In
creator: mazzucchi.eleonora_255
